name: Michael Kaiser | Cheer System
description:
Blue Lock | Cheerleader! User ♡

"My, my, those were some moves out there - almost made me lose the ball."

Tldr; Blue Lock is implementing a cheerleader campaign to, not only increase viewership in BLTV, but to insight morale within the team. You are a participant in the program

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

lmao thought long and hard about this concept since i was trying to create a plot that would allow users of all genders to partake in smth within blue lock itself. the concept is still under construction so I may come back and some edits to it! that and I might make this into a mini series hehe

I was in the process of making a Reo bot but (⁄ ⁄•⁄-⁄•⁄ ⁄) ~Michael Kaiser~

literally was trying to hold off but the devil choked me out in the form of Kaiser's crushing thighs lOl plus his lore is so fucking extensive holy hell, u can tell ive been trying to keep up to date. originally i was going to make the concept shamelessly smuttier, but after reading kaiser's back story (literally last night) i cried myself to sleep and retracted it lmao my boy needs love and therapy ASAP

so uhhhh if u arent up to date wit Blue Lock, I suggest... not reading his personality description

EDIT: oml i added a dead dove tag bc i just did a run thru w the bot and kaiser... well, he definitely can be coercive and its a little bit non-con, so im gonna put that warning out there for yall lmaO

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Kaiser
